---
title: "Glossary"
listing:
  id: glossary-listing
  contents:
    - "../words/roles/**/*.qmd"
    - "../words/terms/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../words/terms/index.qmd"
    - "!../words/roles/index.qmd"
  type: custom
  template: glossary.ejs.md
  sort: "title asc"
  fields: [title, description, letter]
---
